ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue associated with the pull request */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pull request */,
  "base_repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base repository of the pull request */,
  "head_repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head repository of the pull request */,
  "head_branch" TEXT /* Head branch of the pull request */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Base branch of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_base_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_repo_id") REFERENCES project_repos ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_head_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_repo_id") REFERENCES project_repos ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request the commit belongs to */,
  "sha" TEXT /* SHA hash of the commit */,
  "ins_del_count" INTEGER /* Number of insertions and deletions associated with this commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_commits_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request the comment belongs to */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score with other comments or discussions */,
  "in_reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment being replied to */,
  "comment_thread_id" INTEGER /* Comment thread ID to group related comments together */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone associated with the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_repos" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_labels" (
  "pr_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_labels_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, changes requested) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "review_thread_id" INTEGER /* Review thread ID to group related reviews together */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_reviews_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merge_requests" (
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge request */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request that was merged */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was merged */,
  "merged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "merge_commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the merge commit */,
  "merged_by_username" TEXT /* Username of the user who merged the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merge_requests_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the setting */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository associated with the setting */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_settings_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES project_repos ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_settings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_repos ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project user association */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., contributor, maintainer) */,
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invitation associated with the project user */,
  "invited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitation was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES project_repos ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity affected (e.g., pull_request, issue) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "entity_action" TEXT /* Action performed on the entity */,
  "entity_extra_info" TEXT /* Extra information about the entity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
